LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - CONTINUED FROM NOV-10-2004 TO LAW AND MOTION AT NOV-15-2004, 9:30 AM IN DEPT.301, THE HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II IS SITTING IN DEPARTMENT 301 ON WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 10, 2004 AND RECUSES HIMSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER. THEREFORE, THE DEMURRER IS C O N T I N U E D T O NOVEMBER 15, 2004 AND IS TO BE HEARD BY THE HON. JAMES L. WARREN. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II:REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 -

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN. CENTURY INDEMNITY CASE GOVERNS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED without leave to amend; statute of limitations has run. Century Indemnity case governs. Order signed. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2004 Continued To Nov-15-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT REPUBLIC INDEMNITY COMPANY OF AMERICA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- the Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II is sitting in Department 301 on Wednesday, November 10, 2004 and recuses himself from hearing this matter. Therefore, the demurrer is C O N T I N U E D T O NOVEMBER 15, 2004 and is to be heard by the Hon. JAMES L. WARREN. (301/ajr/eh) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
